news.headline: Carlyle Secured Lending, Inc. prices $300M public offering of 6.750% unsecured notes due 2030. Offering set to close on Oct 18.
news.summary: Carlyle Secured Lending, Inc. (Nasdaq: CGBD) disclosed that they have set the price for their underwritten public offering of $300 million worth of 6.750% unsecured notes due 2030. These notes, which will mature on February 18, 2030, come with the option for the Company to redeem them wholly or partially at the specified redemption price. The closing of this offering is anticipated to be on October 18, 2024, pending the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites.

news.headline: Veris Residential, Inc. schedules Third Quarter 2024 financial results and webcast. Based in Jersey City.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE: VRE), a progressive real estate investment trust focused on environmental and social responsibility, based in Jersey City, New Jersey, revealed its latest updates. Veris Residential specializes in Class A multifamily properties, engaging in ownership, operation, acquisition, and development.

news.headline: Coursera set to reveal Q3 2024 financial performance.
Artivion presents positive findings at EACTS Annual Meeting: 94% patients free from reoperation, 90% cerebral malperfusion resolution.
news.summary: The latest findings from the AMDS DARTS trial reveal promising results in aortic remodeling with 94% of patients avoiding unforeseen reoperations. Additionally, initial observations from the AMDS PERSEVERE trial indicate that 90% of subjects experiencing cerebral malperfusion showed resolution following AMDS implantation. Stay tuned for the complete 1-year data report from the trials.

news.headline: Mercy introduces Eversense 365, a 365-day continuous glucose monitor for Type 1 & Type 2 diabetes patients. Launch by Ascensia Diabetes Care with new campaign.
news.summary: The Eversense 365 by Senseonics has received approval in the United States as an integrated continuous glucose monitoring (iCGM) system for individuals aged 18 and above with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes. Ascensia Diabetes Care is currently initiating the commercial launch of this system. Their new campaign aims to emphasize the distinctive advantages of utilizing this system for managing diabetes.

news.headline: Learn about how Adobe utilizes AI for enhancing operational efficiencies on Bloomberg.
Crane NXT, Co. sets dates for Q3 2024 earnings release and call. Stay tuned for update on financial performance.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global greenhouse gas emissions have reached a record high of 55.3 billion metric tons in 2021. This increase of 2.5% from the previous year is primarily attributed to the rebound in economic activities following the COVID-19 pandemic. The data also showed that China remains the largest emitter of greenhouse gases with 12.4 billion metric tons, followed by the United States with 5.8 billion metric tons. The report highlighted the urgent need for countries to accelerate efforts in reducing emissions to combat climate change effectively.

news.headline: Carpenter Technology declares quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on Dec 5, 2024 to record shareholders on Oct 22.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) disclosed the approval by its Board of Directors of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common stock share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on December 5, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Join Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE: MHK) Third Quarter 2024 earnings conference call on Oct 25, 2024, 11:00 am ET.

news.headline: Buenaventura to hold Q3 2024 earnings call on Oct 31, 2024, with CEO Leandro García Raggio and team reviewing financial results.

(NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM) has announced that their Third Quarter 2024 earnings conference call is scheduled for Thursday, October 31, 2024, at 12:00 PM (Eastern Time) and 11:00 AM (Lima Time). The call will feature Leandro García Raggio, Chief Executive Officer, along with other senior management members, who will review Buenaventura’s financial and operating results for the third quarter.

news.headline: Microsoft will release fiscal year 2025 Q1 financial results on Oct 30, 2024, after market close. Live webcast available.

The report will be published after the market closes and will be available on the Microsoft Investor Relations website. Interested individuals can access the live webcast of the event on the company's website. The publication of these results will provide stakeholders and investors with crucial insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Heron Therapeutics assures ample supply of CINVANTI®, SUSTOL®, and APONVIE® amid IV fluids shortage. #HRTX #biotech
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in San Diego, Heron Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HRTX) announced its commitment to continue providing CINVANTI® (aprepitant) injectable emulsion and SUSTOL® (granisetron) extended-release. As a commercial-stage biotechnology company, Heron affirmed its capability to supply these important medications.

news.headline: Disinfo hampers hurricane recovery; experts caution it can pose real risks and hinder aid efforts.
news.summary: Meteorological experts have cautioned that disseminating misleading information about weather conditions could swiftly lead to tangible dangers and divert attention from essential assistance efforts.

news.headline: Oil-Dri reports record sales and gross profit in Q4, achieves highest annual net income in company history in FY 2024.
news.summary: Oil-Dri Corporation of America, a company trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol ODC, shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on October 10, 2024, in Chicago. Oil-Dri is recognized for manufacturing and selling sorbent mineral products.

news.headline: CBRE Global Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE: IGR) announces $0.06 per share distributions for Oct, Nov, Dec 2024 ($0.18 total).
news.summary: The Board of Trustees of the CBRE Global Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE: IGR) has announced distributions of $0.06 per share for October, November, and December 2024, totaling $0.18 per share. The distribution schedule is as follows: - October 2024: Declaration Date 10-10-2024, Ex-Dividend Date 10-21-2024, Record Date 10-21-2024, Payable Date 10-31-2024. - November 2024: Declaration Date 10-10-2024, Ex-Dividend Date 11-20-2024, Record Date 11-20-2024, Payable Date 11-29-2024. - December 2024: Declaration Date 1-XX-2024 (specific date not provided in the text).

news.headline: SPS Commerce to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 24th after market close, followed by call at 3:30 pm CT.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, SPS Commerce, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPSC) from Minneapolis revealed plans to release its Q3 financial results for the period ending September 30, 2024. The announcement specified that the results will be made public after the market closes on Thursday, October 24, 2024. A call to review these outcomes is scheduled for 3:30 p.m. Central Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day.

news.headline: Sutro Biopharma unveils innovative ADC technology at forum, aims to expand patient reach with new platform.
news.summary: A cutting-edge cell-free platform has been developed to create advanced ADCs, with the aim of reaching a wider range of patients. This proprietary technology allows for more targeted therapies and could potentially expand patient populations for treatment.

news.headline: SuRo Capital Corp. releases Q3 2024 investment portfolio details, showing growth in assets.
Mercy introduces Eversense 365, a 365-day continuous glucose monitor for Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes in the US.
news.summary: Senseonics has received approval in the United States for its Eversense 365 system, an integrated continuous glucose monitoring (iCGM) system designed for individuals aged 18 and above with Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes. This system provides continuous glucose monitoring capabilities, allowing for better management of blood sugar levels. The approval opens up access to this technology for a significant number of individuals with diabetes in the US who can benefit from continuous monitoring to maintain their health.

news.headline: SELLAS Life Sciences (NASDAQ: SLS) to join fireside chat at the 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit on Oct 15 at 9:00 am EDT. CEO Dr. Stergiou will participate.
news.summary: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc. disclosed that Dr. Angelos Stergiou, the company's President and CEO, is set to partake in a fireside chat at the upcoming 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, October 15, 2024, at 9:00 am EDT. SELLAS, a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical firm listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SLS, specializes in developing innovative therapies for various cancer types. This engagement highlights the company's commitment to advancing cancer treatment options within the medical community.

news.headline: Itron to release Q3 results on October 31, 2024.
Vishay Precision Group (NYSE: VPG) to announce Q3 fiscal 2024 results on Nov. 5. Leader in precision tech. Market opens Oct. 10.
news.summary: Vishay Precision Group, Inc., a renowned company in precision measurement and sensing technologies, is set to announce its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024 on November 5, 2024. The results will be disclosed before the market opens on that day. Vishay Precision Group, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the symbol VPG. Stay tuned for the important numbers and insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Qiagen expands liquid biopsy portfolio for oncology, prenatal care, and organ transplants with new ccfDNA kit and QIAsymphony DSP kits.
news.summary: QIAGEN strengthens its position in automated solutions for non-invasive liquid biopsy with new portfolio expansions. The upgraded ccfDNA Kit now includes a urine protocol for EZ1 and 2 instruments to improve cancer research workflows. Additionally, the new QIAsymphony DSP Circulating DNA and Maxi Kits provide high-quality cfDNA for use in further applications. This development showcases QIAGEN's leadership in this field and emphasizes their commitment to enhancing liquid biopsy processes.

news.headline: Codexis will report Q3 2024 financial results on October 31, with a conference call and webcast at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Redwood City-based Codexis, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDXS), known for enzymatic solutions in therapeutics manufacturing, revealed it will disclose its Q3 2024 financial results on October 31, 2024, post-market closing. A conference call and webcast at 4:30 pm Eastern Time will be led by Codexis management to analyze financial results and offer a business update.

news.headline: Innventure sponsors LES Annual Meeting 2024, supporting gathering of IP professionals, offers pathway to commercialize corporations' IP.
news.summary: A prominent innovation commercialization firm is backing a prominent event for intellectual property and licensing experts, providing an external avenue to commercialize the high-potential intellectual property of multinational companies. This support aims to facilitate the commercialization of diverse intellectual assets and foster collaboration among professionals in the field. The event is expected to draw in a significant number of participants from various industries, with a focus on advancing the licensing and commercialization of innovative ideas and technologies. Through this collaboration, multinational corporations can tap into new opportunities to monetize their intellectual property and drive further innovation in the market.

news.headline: Procore set to release Q3 Fiscal Year 2024 results on October 30, 2024, followed by an investor call at 2:00 p.m. PT.

The company, traded on NYSE under PCOR, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time to delve into its financial performance and guidance.

news.headline: Informatica appoints Mitesh Dhruv to Board of Directors, bringing 25 years of experience, named Chair of Audit Committee.
news.summary: Informatica, a prominent company specializing in enterprise AI-empowered cloud data management, has named Mitesh Dhruv to its Board of Directors and as Chair of the Audit Committee. Dhruv, who boasts nearly 25 years of experience in advising technology firms, previously held executive roles at RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a provider of cloud-based communications and collaboration solutions, from 2012 to 2021. His extensive financial background makes him a valuable addition to Informatica's leadership team.

news.headline: Inseego unveils first multi-carrier certified 5G MiFi mobile hotspot for Ignite Channel Program in San Diego.
news.summary: In San Diego, Inseego has introduced the inaugural multi-carrier certified MiFi 5G Mobile Hotspot for their Ignite Channel program. This marks a significant milestone in the Inseego product lineup, allowing seamless connectivity across various carriers. The device is set to revolutionize mobile hotspot experiences with its advanced technology and capabilities.

news.summary: On October 10, 2024, AGM Group Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AGMH), a technology company focused on fintech software services and high-performance hardware, released a statement. The company specializes in producing computing equipment and integrated technologies.

news.headline: Rogers Corp to announce Q3 2024 results on Oct 24 after market close, followed by conference call at 5:00 pm ET. CEO and CFO to host. Livestream available.

news.headline: VOXX Corp Q2 2025: Sales down 18%, gross margin ↑120bps, op expenses down 15%. Domestic business sold for $28M, Florida real estate sale complete.
news.summary: During the first half of Fiscal 2025, sales experienced a decrease of approximately 18%. However, there was a positive development in the gross margin, which saw an increase of 120 basis points. Operating expenses also showed significant improvement, decreasing by over 15%. Additionally, the company successfully sold its domestic accessory business and certain non-core assets, generating approximately $28 million. Furthermore, a real estate transaction in Florida was completed during this period.

news.headline: Agree Realty increases monthly common dividend by 2.4%, resulting in annualized dividend of $3.036 per share.
news.summary: Agree Realty Corporation, based in Royal Oak, Michigan, revealed a 2.4% year-over-year growth. The company announced an annualized dividend of $3.036 per share. As per the latest update on October 10, 2024, the Board of Directors at Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE: ADC) authorized and declared the dividend.

news.headline: Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) will release Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 24, 2024, with conference call at 10:00 a.m. Central Time.
news.summary: In Covington, Louisiana, Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) revealed plans to share its earnings report for the third quarter of 2024 on October 24, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) that same day to discuss these results. news.headline: SmartCentres REIT will release 2024 Q3 results and hold conference call.
news.summary: SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust has announced that they will be releasing their third-quarter results for 2024. This will include important financial numbers such as revenue, earnings, and other key performance indicators. In conjunction with the release, the company will also host a conference call to discuss the results, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the REIT's performance and future outlook. This event allows for a deeper understanding of the financial health and trajectory of SmartCentres REIT moving forward.

news.headline: China's military strength is under scrutiny, with estimates putting its defense spending at nearly $250 billion annually.

Cryptokeying launches new cloud mining plans to simplify cryptocurrency mining. Users can mine Bitcoin and Litecoin with one-click, eliminating hardware hassles. Cloud mining offers low-barrier, high-return investment opportunity in the digital economy.
news.summary: Cryptokeying has introduced new cloud mining plans to cater to the growing interest in cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. These plans aim to simplify cryptocurrency mining by eliminating the need for expensive hardware and technical expertise. Users can now participate in cloud mining to mine popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Litecoin by leveraging remote data center resources. This approach offers a low-barrier, high-return investment opportunity for individuals seeking passive income in the digital economy. The company's spokesperson believes that cloud mining is revolutionizing participation in the digital economy, making it more accessible to a global audience.

news.headline: Allakos reports 77% bioavailability, prolonged mast cell occupancy with AK006 in healthy volunteers. IV results for CSU due in early 2025.
news.summary: AK006, when administered subcutaneously, exhibited a bioavailability of around 77% and maintained prolonged receptor occupancy on mast cells. The subcutaneous delivery of AK006 was well-tolerated with a positive safety profile. Additionally, the Phase 1 trial results for intravenously administered AK006 in chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) patients are anticipated to be announced in the early first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Dorman Products, Inc. will report Q3 financial results on Oct 31, 2024, after Nasdaq closing.
news.summary: In Colmar, Pennsylvania, on October 10, 2024, Dorman Products, Inc. revealed that they will release their financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 28, 2024. The information will be made public following the close of the Nasdaq Stock Market on October 31, 2024. Dorman, traded under the stock symbol "DORM" on the NASDAQ, is set to unveil its performance numbers for this period by the end of this month.

news.headline: Howard Hughes achieved top ranking in GRESB among Americas Diversified Listed real estate companies for sustainability.
news.summary: Today, Howard Hughes revealed that it has reclaimed the highest position within its peer group of Americas Diversified Listed real estate firms according to GRESB rankings. This recognition solidifies Howard Hughes' position as a leader in the industry, reflecting its dedication to excellence in sustainable real estate practices.

news.headline: Alliance for SoCal Innovation partners with Riviera Partners to support startups in region. Los Angeles, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 10, 2024, The Alliance for SoCal Innovation revealed a significant development by establishing a long-term strategic collaboration with Riviera Partners. The collaboration aims to connect entrepreneurs in Southern California with venture capital. This partnership marks a key milestone for the entrepreneurial ecosystem in the region, driving opportunities for growth and innovation.
